metadata.description: The A8os / Loom marketplace — reusable LLM-coordinator infrastructure. a8-loom-coordinator is the first; more a8-loom-* projects follow.

plugins.name: a8-loom-coordinator
plugins.description: Run Claude (or any capable LLM) as an autonomous senior engineer on any codebase — config-driven hooks enforcing discover-then-reuse, plus coordinator/succession/doc-sync skills and planner/builder/auditor agents. Frontend or backend, any language.
